sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board has changed significantly! The level has transformed - the player is now on the right side, and the layout is different. There are green blocks in a new configuration and purple blocks at the bottom. Let me analyze the new state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Analyze the new board state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5]
purples = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'P' and n['pixels'] > 5]
print(f"Green blocks: {len(greens)}")
for g in greens:
    b = g['boundary']
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  center={center}, pixels={g['pixels']}")
print(f"Purple blocks: {len(purples)}")
for p in purples:
    b = p['boundary']
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  center={center}, pixels={p['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
